name: testCloseButtonAndDiscardChanges
description: Verify that a new Merchant wasn't added once click 'Close' button
descriptionHtml: Verify that a new Merchant wasn't added once click 'Close' button

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that a new Merchant wasn't added once click 'Close' button

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select a company into 'Select company' filter field
Click on the 'Close' button to close form
The table is empty and 'No rows to display.' is displayed
